scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @kullin/mobile && npm run lint -w @kullin/api --if-present
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @kullin/mobile && npm run typecheck -w @kullin/api && npm run typecheck -w @kullin/contracts --if-present
scripts.test: npm run test -w @kullin/mobile && npm run test -w @kullin/api
scripts.test:ci: npm run test:ci -w @kullin/mobile && npm run test -w @kullin/api
scripts.prebuild: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
